name: TokenComponent
description:
A token is used to represent contextualizing information.
They can be useful to show applied filters, selected values for form fields or object metadata.

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description: Whether the token is selected. Supports two-way binding via [(selected)].

outputs.name: elementFocused
outputs.description: Emitted when token element received or lost focus.

outputs.name: onCloseClick
outputs.description: Emitted when the *x* icon is clicked. Specifically, any pseudo-element.

outputs.name: onRemove
outputs.description: Emitted when token should be removed

outputs.name: onTokenClick
outputs.description: Emitted when a token is clicked.

outputs.name: onTokenKeydown
outputs.description: Emitted when a there's a keydown registered on the token.

outputs.name: selectedChange
outputs.description: Whether the token is selected. Supports two-way binding via [(selected)].
